iterations.notes: First production version. Covers five-rung escalation ladder (zero-shot → few-shot → CoT → chaining → ReAct), success-criteria-first discipline, context budget controls, output determinism, and hallucination-reduction cues. Three eval scenarios: sentiment classification, grounded QA, over-prompting repair.
known_gaps: No eval scenario for prompt chaining (rung 4)
ReAct pattern has docs reference but no worked example in examples/
Context budget guidance lacks concrete token-count thresholds
improvements_needed: Add chaining example: extract-then-summarize two-stage prompt file
Add ReAct example with tool_use interleaving
Add numeric token-budget table to docs/techniques.md (concise/medium/long tiers)
